styleEdit.dailyRitual: Polish a button or a piece of jewellery to ensure it shines for the arrival.
styleEdit.description: The vibe is "International Person of Mystery" even if you are just grabbing a coffee. Reach for the pieces that have a backstory, like that weird thrift find or the jacket you bought on a whim. Pair the eclectic stuff with your sensible basics to show you know exactly what you are doing. It is time to let your wardrobe show off a little.
styleEdit.title: The Export
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you value the pieces you already own?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Point a finger decisively to practice giving direction.
styleEdit.description: Dress like you are calling the shots today by ensuring your silhouette is distinct; strong lines and a defined shape help you take up space. Ditch slouchy or vague fits in favour of intentional tailoring because you want to direct the eye exactly where it needs to go. You are the boss so dress like it.
styleEdit.title: The Director
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style command respect?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Rub your hands together to create heat and hold them to your clothes.
styleEdit.description: Radiate energy with sunny vibes and warm-toned accessories because even if the sky is grey you can still bring the heat with layers that feel cosy and bright. Today is about embodying the energy of the sun so this is your chance to be the person who brightens the room just by walking into it.
styleEdit.title: The Warmth
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel warm inside and out?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Join your hands together to close the circuit of your energy.
styleEdit.description: Everything comes together today. Harmonise the conflicting parts of your style into one seamless whole. Match the bag to the boots and the energy to the room. It is the satisfaction of the final puzzle piece clicking into place. Walk like someone who has finally got it all figured out.
styleEdit.title: The Synthesis
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the signature look that you want to be remembered for? # Suit of Swords

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand with your hands on your hips to physically claim your personal space.
styleEdit.description: Claim your space with crisp, structured textures that hold their own shape. A stiff collar or a defined cuff creates a physical boundary between you and the world, instantly inviting respect. Wear your standards high and your fabrics opaque.
styleEdit.title: The Boundary
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel untouchable?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Sway gently from side to side to find your centre of gravity.
styleEdit.description: Life requires flexibility today so your outfit should offer a full range of motion. Stretchy textiles, elasticated waists, or jersey blends allow you to pivot gracefully between tasks. Avoid anything too rigid that might snap under pressure. You are balancing multiple priorities so ensure your clothes can keep up with the tempo.
styleEdit.title: The Juggle
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit work for every part of your day?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Turn a garment inside out or inspect the lining to see how it was made.
styleEdit.description: Why follow the rules when you can just rewrite them? Shake things up by building your look in reverse. Start with the socks or shoes, then jump straight to the headwear or earrings, filling in the middle last. It’s a little chaotic, sure, but it stops you from reaching for the same old combos and helps you see your clothes with fresh eyes.
styleEdit.title: The Experiment
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: When was the last time you surprised yourself with an outfit?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Open your palms or extend a hand to mimic the flow of giving.
styleEdit.description: Generosity flows both ways so dress with an open spirit. Soft, draping fabrics that move away from the body suggest an abundance of material. Give anything too tight or restrictive a miss today. You want to look like you have more than enough energy to share with the room.
styleEdit.title: The Exchange
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe would you happily lend to a friend?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Name one thing you want to 'manifest' today. Let that intention be the final layer you put on.
styleEdit.description: Today is a good day to make the outfit count. Don’t just get dressed, cast yourself in the lead role. Look for things like structured shoulders or high-contrast lapels that frame the face and naturally draw the eye upwards. Craft a distinct persona using the clothes already in your wardrobe and dress like you’re about to pull a rabbit (or a promotion) out of a hat.
styleEdit.title: The Showman
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes speak for you before you’ve even said a word?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand with your feet perfectly parallel and centre your weight before walking out.
styleEdit.description: Commit to the bit and create a silhouette that connects effortlessly from top to bottom. Embrace the total look of a matching set or a single seamless piece like a boiler suit. There is undeniable power in total cohesion, so let one major aesthetic decision do the heavy lifting for you today.
styleEdit.title: The Commitment
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What happens to your mood when you fully commit to a single aesthetic choice for the day?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Slowly drape a layer over your shoulders and pull the front edges together to seal your space before walking out the door.
styleEdit.description: Today’s energy is giving “I know something you don't” so drape yourself in intentional mystery. Translucent layering over a solid base creates a smoke-and-mirrors profile that hints at the shape while keeping the actual details strictly off-limits. Try a sheer top under a sturdy jacket, or a mesh layer over a solid tank. Or keep the neckline higher and wrap close to the face to protect your peace. If it feels like you're wearing a secret, you've nailed it.
styleEdit.title: The Veil
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Where are you currently over-explaining yourself through your style?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Wrap a scarf or cardigan around yourself to seal your aura.
styleEdit.description: Plush, enveloping textures offer a gentle and tactile barrier against today’s noise. Let soothing, diluted tones and soft layers reflect your intuitive nature. Dress to feel rather than to be seen, protecting your energy in the process.
styleEdit.title: The Empath
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which fabric makes you feel safe?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Twirl or sway gently to catch the air in your clothes.
styleEdit.description: Logic is overrated so dress with whimsy. A puffy sleeve, a floating hem, or a quirky accessory that looks like it came from a fairytale fits the mood. Let your imagination dictate your style today. If it feels magical, wear it.
styleEdit.title: The Daydreamer
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the most whimsical thing you own?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Join your hands together to close the circuit of your energy.
styleEdit.description: Everything comes together today. Harmonise the conflicting parts of your style into one seamless whole. Match the bag to the boots and the energy to the room. It is the satisfaction of the final puzzle piece clicking into place. Walk like someone who has finally got it all figured out.
styleEdit.title: The Synthesis
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the signature look that you want to be remembered for? # Suit of Swords

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stroke a soft fabric and enjoy the sensation for yourself.
styleEdit.description: Enjoy your own company in high-quality comfort. Cashmere, fine linens, or soft leather are purely for your enjoyment alone. After all, you don't need an audience to dress well. The ultimate luxury is dressing up when you have nowhere to go.
styleEdit.title: The Solitary
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress up even when you are alone?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Set your gaze on the furthest point of the horizon before stepping out.
styleEdit.description: Let your outfit take on any strain the day may bring. A solid waistband or some supportive tailoring helps you stand tall even if you are just leaning against a wall checking your phone. Pick a highly visible silhouette that refuses to blend into the scenery and holds its own perfectly.
styleEdit.title: The Anticipation
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your posture match the quality of your outfit?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Smile at yourself in the mirror to activate your magnetic field.
styleEdit.description: Charisma is a texture today so choose fabrics that draw people in like soft suedes, silks, or tactile knits. Become the centre of gravity by dressing with a warmth that invites connection. Keep the palette rich and inviting because you don't need to chase attention; your outfit will attract it for you.
styleEdit.title: The Magnet
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which outfit makes you feel the most attractive?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Pour yourself a glass of water and drink it slowly to connect with the element of flow.
styleEdit.description: Some days the cup just runneth over so let your wardrobe be just as fluid. Look for textiles that pour over the body like water and refuse to hold a rigid shape. Silk, rayon, or soft jersey are your best friends here. You are a vessel for good energy so dress like a very chic waterfall.
styleEdit.title: The Overflow
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which fabric in your wardrobe feels most like liquid against your skin?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Exhale deeply while letting your shoulders drop away from your ears.
styleEdit.description: Constriction is a no-go today so opt for loose, flowing layers instead. Allow the chest and throat plenty of room to breathe by skipping tight collars and restrictive waistbands. Letting the energy circulate is much easier when you wear soft, breathable textures. Treat the fit as a gentle hug rather than a cage.
styleEdit.title: The Release
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What are you wearing right now that demands too much effort?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Apply a scent to your pulse points to mark your own boundaries.
styleEdit.description: Choose an aesthetic that feels open rather than guarded today. Loosen the fit to let the air in. Focus on that easy, lived-in energy instead of pristine, untouchable perfection. You want a vibe that makes you feel the most comfortable in your own skin, while remaining totally in control of the situation.
styleEdit.title: The Exposure
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most vulnerable?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Chin up and shoulders back to practice your victory walk.
styleEdit.description: Give them something to look at with high-contrast combinations and accessories that catch the light. This could mean bold colours, patterns, or simply a striking mix of black and white if that feels more you. Wear the piece that always gets compliments because you have earned the right to take up space.
styleEdit.title: The Parade
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What do you wear when you want to be noticed?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Point a finger decisively to practice giving direction.
styleEdit.description: Dress like you are calling the shots today by ensuring your silhouette is distinct; strong lines and a defined shape help you take up space. Ditch slouchy or vague fits in favour of intentional tailoring because you want to direct the eye exactly where it needs to go. You are the boss so dress like it.
styleEdit.title: The Director
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style command respect?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand on a step or a curb to physically take the high ground.
styleEdit.description: Today we’re not just taking the moral high ground, we are wearing it. Chunky soles, platforms, or boots keep you literally above the fray. It is hard to be bothered by any drama when you are looking down on it from your aesthetically superior vantage point.
styleEdit.title: The High Ground
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your footwear make you feel taller?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Join your hands together to close the circuit of your energy.
styleEdit.description: Everything comes together today. Harmonise the conflicting parts of your style into one seamless whole. Match the bag to the boots and the energy to the room. It is the satisfaction of the final puzzle piece clicking into place. Walk like someone who has finally got it all figured out.
styleEdit.title: The Synthesis
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the signature look that you want to be remembered for? # Suit of Swords

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Close your eyes and ask your body what it needs before dressing.
styleEdit.description: Try listening to what your body wants to wear. If it craves comfort, give it soft knits. If it craves structure then give it a belt. Trust your body's response to your clothing. Your body knows what it needs to support you today better than your mind does.
styleEdit.title: The Intuitive
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you listen to your body when you get dressed?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Name one thing you want to 'manifest' today. Let that intention be the final layer you put on.
styleEdit.description: Today is a good day to make the outfit count. Don’t just get dressed, cast yourself in the lead role. Look for things like structured shoulders or high-contrast lapels that frame the face and naturally draw the eye upwards. Craft a distinct persona using the clothes already in your wardrobe and dress like you’re about to pull a rabbit (or a promotion) out of a hat.
styleEdit.title: The Showman
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do your clothes speak for you before you’ve even said a word?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Rub your hands together to create heat and hold them to your clothes.
styleEdit.description: Radiate energy with sunny vibes and warm-toned accessories because even if the sky is grey you can still bring the heat with layers that feel cosy and bright. Today is about embodying the energy of the sun so this is your chance to be the person who brightens the room just by walking into it.
styleEdit.title: The Warmth
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel warm inside and out?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Put your clothes on in a different order than usual to disrupt the cycle.
styleEdit.description: Choose silhouettes that create a full circle of volume around the body. A-line cuts, wide-leg trousers, or cape-like coats work perfectly here. The fabric should possess enough weight to flare out dramatically when you turn a corner, creating your own gravity as you move. If life spins you around you might as well look spectacular.
styleEdit.title: The Rotation
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you wear the same few outfits on a loop?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Turn a collar up or cuff a sleeve differently to physically alter the garment’s destiny.
styleEdit.description: Give a forgotten piece a brand new context today by styling it against its original purpose. Consider wearing a highly formal layer with heavy combat boots, or use a silk scarf as a makeshift belt. Take something old and wear it with zero nostalgia for how it was "supposed" to be worn.
styleEdit.title: The Compost
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What piece of clothing deserves a second life?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Fasten two separate layers together with a pin or belt to physically symbolize union.
styleEdit.description: Opposites attract, so try pairing your toughest fabric with your softest, most fragile one. Notice how the tension between a rigid silhouette and a fluid drape creates visual harmony. Pair conflicting pieces, like thick leather over a silk-like base, or robust footwear paired with a sheer layer. They might absolutely hate each other on the hanger, but on you? It’s pure chemistry. Let the friction spark a little romance.
styleEdit.title: The Duality
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which two items in your wardrobe seem to hate each other and can you make them friends?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Polish a button or a piece of jewellery to ensure it shines for the arrival.
styleEdit.description: The vibe is "International Person of Mystery" even if you are just grabbing a coffee. Reach for the pieces that have a backstory, like that weird thrift find or the jacket you bought on a whim. Pair the eclectic stuff with your sensible basics to show you know exactly what you are doing. It is time to let your wardrobe show off a little.
styleEdit.title: The Export
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you value the pieces you already own?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Chin up and shoulders back to practice your victory walk.
styleEdit.description: Give them something to look at with high-contrast combinations and accessories that catch the light. This could mean bold colours, patterns, or simply a striking mix of black and white if that feels more you. Wear the piece that always gets compliments because you have earned the right to take up space.
styleEdit.title: The Parade
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What do you wear when you want to be noticed?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Place a hand on your chest and take a deep breath to centre your heart space.
styleEdit.description: Vulnerability is a strength so consider an open neckline or a lighter, more breathable weave to symbolise letting people in. Soft, pastel tones or gentle neutrals can communicate a willingness to connect. Skip the dense padding or stiff collars that block communication. Dress with the softness you wish to receive from the world.
styleEdit.title: The Open Heart
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your outfit invite connection or build a wall?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Check your reflection and see the best version of yourself looking back.
styleEdit.description: If you are chasing a dream, then dress for the vision. Wear an outfit that represents your highest ideal of yourself. It might be a little dressier than necessary but that is the whole point. Embodying your ideal self is the first step to becoming them.
styleEdit.title: The Idealist
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Does your style reflect who you are or who you want to be?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Open your palms or extend a hand to mimic the flow of giving.
styleEdit.description: Generosity flows both ways so dress with an open spirit. Soft, draping fabrics that move away from the body suggest an abundance of material. Give anything too tight or restrictive a miss today. You want to look like you have more than enough energy to share with the room.
styleEdit.title: The Exchange
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe would you happily lend to a friend?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Empty your pockets of anything unnecessary before leaving.
styleEdit.description: Leave the baggage behind today. A stripped-back, minimalist aesthetic reflects a desire to travel light. Stick to the absolute essentials and leave any heavy, decorative fluff for another day. We are seeking depth not decoration so keep the surface nice and clean.
styleEdit.title: The Minimalist
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Could you survive with only a carry-on suitcase of clothes?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Rub your hands together to create heat and hold them to your clothes.
styleEdit.description: Radiate energy with sunny vibes and warm-toned accessories because even if the sky is grey you can still bring the heat with layers that feel cosy and bright. Today is about embodying the energy of the sun so this is your chance to be the person who brightens the room just by walking into it.
styleEdit.title: The Warmth
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel warm inside and out?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Join your hands together to close the circuit of your energy.
styleEdit.description: Everything comes together today. Harmonise the conflicting parts of your style into one seamless whole. Match the bag to the boots and the energy to the room. It is the satisfaction of the final puzzle piece clicking into place. Walk like someone who has finally got it all figured out.
styleEdit.title: The Synthesis
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What is the signature look that you want to be remembered for? # Suit of Swords

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Put something unexpected in your pocket like a crystal or a note.
styleEdit.description: The element of surprise is in the air today so try adding an entirely unexpected element to today’s look. A pop of neon in a neutral outfit or a playful pin on a lapel. Keep it lighthearted and fun. Fashion doesn't always have to be so serious.
styleEdit.title: The Surprise
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you take your style too seriously?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Fasten two separate layers together with a pin or belt to physically symbolize union.
styleEdit.description: Opposites attract, so try pairing your toughest fabric with your softest, most fragile one. Notice how the tension between a rigid silhouette and a fluid drape creates visual harmony. Pair conflicting pieces, like thick leather over a silk-like base, or robust footwear paired with a sheer layer. They might absolutely hate each other on the hanger, but on you? It’s pure chemistry. Let the friction spark a little romance.
styleEdit.title: The Duality
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which two items in your wardrobe seem to hate each other and can you make them friends?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand in a patch of natural light and let your outfit absorb the sun.
styleEdit.description: Hope has a special sheen to it. Gravitate towards fabrics that easily catch and refract the light. Silks, satins, or subtle high-shine textures bring an especially luminous, expensive quality to the silhouette today. The cut should be open and optimistic, perhaps exposing the neck or arms. The aim is a polished, glowing aesthetic. You are the distant light in someone else’s gloom so remember to shine without apology.
styleEdit.title: The Glow
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which garment makes you feel the most optimistic?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Stand in front of a mirror and smile before you look at the clothes to set the baseline.
styleEdit.description: Opt for luminous textures that amplify natural light rather than absorbing it. Use high-shine hardware to act as a conductor for the energy. The fit should be bold and unmissable, commanding the room through pure brightness alone. You are beaming, baby, don’t dim that light.
styleEdit.title: The Spotlight
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which item in your wardrobe brings you unadulterated joy?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Pour yourself a glass of water and drink it slowly to connect with the element of flow.
styleEdit.description: Some days the cup just runneth over so let your wardrobe be just as fluid. Look for textiles that pour over the body like water and refuse to hold a rigid shape. Silk, rayon, or soft jersey are your best friends here. You are a vessel for good energy so dress like a very chic waterfall.
styleEdit.title: The Overflow
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Which fabric in your wardrobe feels most like liquid against your skin?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Chin up and shoulders back to practice your victory walk.
styleEdit.description: Give them something to look at with high-contrast combinations and accessories that catch the light. This could mean bold colours, patterns, or simply a striking mix of black and white if that feels more you. Wear the piece that always gets compliments because you have earned the right to take up space.
styleEdit.title: The Parade
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: What do you wear when you want to be noticed?

styleEdit.dailyRitual: Shake out the tension before stepping out.
styleEdit.description: Channel your inner animal through texture with presence. Look for fabrics with a visible grain, pile, or density that feel instinctive to touch. Keep the cuts simple to let the texture dominate. It is about wearing your instincts on the outside. Let the world see you are not to be trifled with, even when you’re just stepping out for milk.
styleEdit.title: The Wild Side
styleEdit.wardrobeReflection: Do you dress to blend in or to hunt?
